hero.title: One dashboard for quiz operations from file to publish

quality.title: Content quality guardrails
quality.description: Keep the team aligned with Quizy publishing rules.
items: Do not guess unclear text or correct answers.
Every question needs lesson IDs and files when required.
Math content stays in MathLm with LaTeX only.
